labels.value: Verify if User sees error message upon giving invalid python code in Editor box after navigating to tryEditor page from Types of Binary Trees page

labels.value: Verify if User sees error message upon giving invalid python code in Editor box after navigating to tryEditor page from Types of Binary Trees page

name: Verify if User sees error message upon giving invalid python code in Editor box after navigating to tryEditor page from Types of Binary Trees page

steps.name: Given User is in landing page
When User clicks on getStarted button in landing page and SignIn button in Home Page
And User enters valid credentials for login and Clicks Submit in Login Page
Then User should navigate to home Page with title "NumpyNinja"
When User enters invalid python code in the textBox from the  "TryEditor" and  1 to tryEditor page from Types of Binary Trees page and clicks on run button
Then User should see alert error message of try editor page from Types of Binary Trees page.
